'''Krayn's pirate ship''' was a massive [[Starship/Legends|starship]] that the [[T'surr (species)|T'surr]] slave-[[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] and crime-lord [[Krayn]] used to capture other space vessels and to acquire [[Slavery/Legends|slaves]] for his illegal [[Spice/Legends|spice]]-processing operations on [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]].

{{Ship-stub}}
